brand_identity.name: Caesura
brand_identity.visual_style: Editorial Hybrid (Stark Light Mode Marketplace vs. Deep Dark Mode Creator Studio)
design_principles: Content is King: The apparel art is the hero. UI recedes.
Radical Contrast: Mix Swiss typographic precision with raw, streetwear energy.
Tactile Digital: Use noise, grain, and smooth motion to make pixels feel like fabric.
Asymmetry: Avoid centering. Use the 'Grid of Tension'.

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts: Syne (400, 700, 800), Space Grotesk (400, 500, 700), Inter (variable), JetBrains Mono.

usage.accent_rule: Use Electric Blue (#0047FF) sparingly. Only for primary CTAs (Upload, Buy) and active states.
usage.text_rule: Never use pure black text on white. Use #09090B. Never use pure white text on black. Use #FAFAFA.

grid_system.marketplace: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-y-12 gap-x-8

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-12 px-8 rounded-full

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden bg-transparent border-none rounded-none

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-none border-x-0 border-t-0 border-b border-input bg-transparent px-0 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 transition-colors

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

landing_page.hero: Full-screen cinematic video or large typography with parallax scrolling.
landing_page.featured_section: Horizontal scrolling marquee (infinite loop) + massive product cards.

marketplace.layout: Masonry grid with varied aspect ratios. Infinite scroll.
marketplace.filters: Sticky sidebar with accordion filters. Minimal checkboxes.

creator_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (collapsed by default on mobile). High density data tables.
creator_dashboard.charts: Line charts with gradient fill (Electric Blue to Transparent).

product_detail.layout: Split screen: Left (Sticky Images), Right (Scrollable Details).

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add @import for Syne, Space Grotesk, Inter, JetBrains Mono in index.css.
RESET CSS: Ensure 'border-border' is applied to all elements in base layer.
NO DEFAULT SHADCN: Heavily customize Shadcn components. Remove rounded corners from cards/inputs.
USE IMAGES: Use the provided image_urls for placeholders. Do not use gray boxes.
ANIMATE: Use framer-motion for page transitions and stagger effects on grids.
DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Avoid centering text unless it is a massive headline.
Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
Ensure high contrast in Dark Mode (pure black background #09090B vs pure white text #FAFAFA).
